texto: Based on his experience, he has come to believe that the drone program amounts to little more than death by unreliable metadata. "People get hung up that there's a targeted list of people," he said. "It's really like we're targeting a cell phone. We're not going after people – we're going after their phones, in the hopes that the person on the other end of that missile is the bad guy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeremy Scahill: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Based on his experience, he has come to believe that the drone program amounts to little more tha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, drone-attacks, drones pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e termino.
